assertions.description: The analyzer reports a DFM violation: board height 114.3mm exceeds the 100mm threshold used for standard JLCPCB pricing tier. The board width (68.58mm) is within 100mm. The message accurately states 'Board size 68.58x114.3mm exceeds 100x100mm — higher fabrication pricing tier at JLCPCB'. This is a genuine and actionable finding.

INCORRECT: The PCB stats report smd_count=7 and tht_count=27. The 7 SMD footprints are: REF1, REF2, REF3, REF4, REF5, REF**, and U1 (NCP1117 SOT-223). The REF* references are mounting hole footprints (Mounting_Holes:MountingHole_3.2mm_M3_ISO14580_Pad) with a single SMD pad. These are mechanically-only features, not electrical SMD components. Counting mounting holes as SMD components overstates the SMD assembly complexity. Only U1 is a genuine SMD electrical component.
